idea-plugin.name: Sightline for Claude Code
idea-plugin.description:
Sightline is a graphical chat panel for Claude Code in Android Studio and IntelliJ-based IDEs, inspired by the VS Code Claude Code experience. It drives your locally installed claude CLI over its streaming-JSON protocol and renders the conversation — streaming replies, extended thinking, tool calls, edits, and results — in a native Swing tool window with message bubbles and a Claude Code-style composer.

Requires the Claude Code CLI to be installed (the claude command). Sightline is an independent, unofficial wrapper and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic. "Claude" and "Claude Code" are trademarks of Anthropic; used here only to describe compatibility.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.6.0 — New Agent Activity Map: replaces the generic "Thinking…" indicator with a live, force-directed graph of what Claude is observably touching — files, searches, commands, Gradle tasks, tests, errors and generated patches — grouped into architectural clusters, with a current-focus card, clickable node details (open/reveal in the IDE), and an activity timeline. Choose a Chat, Split or Map-only layout from the header. Observable activity only; it makes no claim to reveal hidden reasoning.
0.1.0 — Initial release: streaming chat panel, extended-thinking & tool-call rendering, edit/diff previews, model & permission-mode selectors, and session resume.
